allow: PowerShell(try { $response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:52333/api/llm/config" -Method GET -TimeoutSec 5 -ErrorAction Stop; $response.Content } catch { Write-Host "Error: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $body = @{ baseUrl = "https://api.deepseek.com/v1/"; model = "deepseek-chat" } | ConvertTo-Json; $response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:52333/api/llm/config" -Method PUT -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -TimeoutSec 5 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host "Status:" $response.StatusCode; Write-Host "Body:" $response.Content } catch { Write-Host "Error:" $_.Exception.GetType\(\).Name; Write-Host "Message:" $_.Exception.Message })

PowerShell(try { $response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:52333/api/llm/config" -Method GET -TimeoutSec 3 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host "Status:" $response.StatusCode; Write-Host $response.Content } catch { Write-Host "Error:" $_.Exception.GetType\(\).Name "-" $_.Exception.Message })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; try { $response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:52333/api/llm/config" -Method GET -TimeoutSec 5 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host "Backend OK:" $response.Content } catch { Write-Host "Backend not ready yet:" $_.Exception.Message })

PowerShell($body = '{"baseUrl":"https://api.deepseek.com/v1/","model":"deepseek-chat"}'; try { $response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:52333/api/llm/config" -Method PUT -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Host "OK:" $response.StatusCode; Write-Host $response.Content } catch { $errorMsg = $_.Exception.Message; Write-Host "Error: $errorMsg"; if \($_.Exception.Response\) { $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\)\); $respBody = $reader.ReadToEnd\(\); $reader.Close\(\); Write-Host "ResponseBody: $respBody" } })

PowerShell($client = New-Object System.Net.Http.HttpClient; $content = New-Object System.Net.Http.StringContent\('{"baseUrl":"https://api.deepseek.com/v1/","model":"deepseek-chat"}', [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8, "application/json"\); $response = $client.PutAsync\("http://localhost:52333/api/llm/config", $content\).Result; Write-Host "Status:" $response.StatusCode; Write-Host "Body:" $response.Content.ReadAsStringAsync\(\).Result)
PowerShell(powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File "E:\\Desktop\\lng接收站智能\\LNG接收站智能启停系统\\test-config.ps1")

PowerShell($body = @{ username = "admin"; password = "admin123"; roleCode = "ADMIN" } | ConvertTo-Json; try { $response = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:52333/api/auth/register" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Host \($response | ConvertTo-Json\) } catch { Write-Host "StatusCode:" $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__; $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\)\); Write-Host \($reader.ReadToEnd\(\)\); $reader.Close\(\) })
